[胃]
Pictogram ( 象形 ): a stomach with food inside, originally appearing as 𱕻 . A semantic 肉 was added later to differentiate.
The bronze script form merely consisted of two concentric circles. An inner portion of the character was later added, namely a mutated form of the seal script character of 米 ("rice"), representing grains within the stomach (see also 鬯 ).
The character looked like 𦞅 in the small seal script. In the clerical script form, the upper component was simplified to the unrelated 田 as an instance of libian simplification.
The ancient form of the character can be seen within the lower component of 𦳊 .

[胄]
Diverged from a variant of 冑 ( OC *l'ɯwɢs ). Now a phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *l'ɯwɢs ): semantic 肉 + phonetic 由 ( OC *lɯw ) .

[冑]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *l'ɯwɢs ): semantic 冃 + phonetic 由 ( OC *lɯw ) .
